description: Square card combining a background photograph with overlaid headline text. The photograph shows an interior drywall site: a partially finished room with a bare gray drywall ceiling and a recessed light fixture, a stepladder at right, and a worker in a white shirt crouched at the base of a wall near a bucket and a broom. Across the upper-middle is a small navy-blue tab with white italic caps reading 'LABOR NEWS,' and below it a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Phoenix drywall, painting contractor must pay $7.4M+ in wages, damages after deliberately denying overtime to 1,400+ employees.' A navy bar at lower right carries the wordmark 'dol.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Phoenix drywall, painting contractor must pay $7.4M+ in wages, damages after deliberately denying overtime to 1,400+ employees / dol.gov/newsroom
